title: Discover and instrument your first service using Instrumentation Hub

blocks.content:
Welcome to the Grafana learning path that teaches you how to use Instrumentation Hub to discover your Kubernetes services and enable zero-code instrumentation.

Instrumentation Hub is a Grafana Cloud feature that automatically discovers your services and lets you enable telemetry capture without any code changes. Using Beyla (eBPF-based instrumentation), you can get RED metrics, traces, and more flowing to Grafana Cloud in minutes.

![Instrumentation Hub showing discovered services](https://grafana.com/media/docs/grafana-cloud/instrumentation/ihub-first-page.png)

## Here's what to expect

When you complete this learning path, you'll be able to:

- Understand the value of zero-code instrumentation
- Access Instrumentation Hub and view discovered services
- Select a service and enable instrumentation
- Verify that telemetry data is flowing to Grafana Cloud

## Before you begin

Before you discover and instrument services using Instrumentation Hub, ensure that you have:

- A Grafana Cloud account. To create an account, refer to [Grafana Cloud](https://grafana.com/signup/cloud/connect-account).
- Access to a Linux-based Kubernetes cluster
- At least one HTTP-based application service running in the cluster

## Troubleshooting

If you get stuck, we've got your back! Where appropriate, troubleshooting information is just a click away.

## More to explore

We understand you might want to explore other capabilities not strictly on this path. We'll provide you opportunities where it makes sense.
